title: ilex clementis
intro: Ilex clementis, also known as the Taiwan holly or Taiwanese holly, is a species of flowering plant in the holly family, native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ilex clementis include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Ilex clementis is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
